items.summary: In the backend trading loop (tradingLoop()), revert the order quantity calculation from the fixed 2 ICP (200_000_000 e8s) back to the original dynamic $10 per order formula: quantity = 10 / midPrice (in ICP terms, using the current mid-price). This dynamic calculation must be used as the default for all grid orders (both BUY and SELL sides) going forward.
